quote: Oh my - I loved this Gathering! I loved hearing from the global community that we shared the passion, recognized racist systems and institutions, and were willing to evolve in child welfare. We were working towards similar goals.

The Gathering was really amazing. Such an inspiring set of speakers and participants. Every session I attended was 100% worth my time and has given me lots to think about. I loved hearing varying perspectives and connecting with peers.
role: Academic, Advocate, Consultant, Trainer/Coach/Technical assistance provider

quote: I enjoyed meeting and hearing from people from all over the world and learning about their work.
I enjoyed listening to people from across the world speak about their experiences in other countries. It was a wonderful connection.
I wasn't sure I could pick just one. This was absolutely the most valuable and inspiring Gathering I had attended in terms of content, virtual or in-person, in my 25+ years in the field!
It was amazing to be part of a Gathering with individuals all over the world. We all worked with children and families, and we all wanted to make a difference and create impact.

The speed networking was the most positive experience. I had such fun and learned a great deal. The workshops were excellent, the presenters were professional and informed, and I loved the Gathering overall.
role: Child welfare practitioner, Resource or foster parent, Trainer/Coach/Technical assistance provider

quote: I valued learning about child welfare services across the globe and having opportunities to network.
role: Academic, Child welfare practitioner, Community and/or neighborhood leader, Kinship care provider

quote: It was interesting to hear how systems worked in different countries across the world. Hearing from people with experience in family regulation systems and the similarities in each experience was eye opening.
I learned that the challenges I experienced in my work seemed to be the same all over the world.
I valued hearing from others around the world.

There were so many positive experiences. Parents from around the world uniting was very impactful, and hearing from courageous women who made their way through what must have felt impossible was powerful.
I loved connecting with professionals across the globe!
organizationType: Private or community-based child welfare agency/organization

quote: I valued being with people from all over the world in an accessible format.

I really liked hearing what others were doing all over the world. I also liked that I could access the videos for a while. I planned to watch them! There were so many great presentations that I was not able to attend.
role: Mental health professional, Manager for prevention programs

quote: I valued being in fellowship with individuals across the globe.
